mapper.insert: insert into hybridanalysis.file (file_name, file_path, create_time, update_time, source_folder_id, unpack_path) values (#{fileName}, #{filePath}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{sourceFolderId}, #{unpackPath})
mapper.select: select id, file_name, file_path, create_time, update_time, source_folder_id, unpack_path from hybridanalysis.file where source_folder_id = #{sourceFolderId}

select id from hybridanalysis.file
file_name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
